meaning: adj.成熟的,到期的,充分考虑的,(票据等)到期的vt.使成熟vi.成熟,到期
examples: Jane is very mature for her age.
Girls become sexually mature earlier than boys.
Clare has a mature and responsible attitude to work.
Alas, mature, or self-sustaining, are not yet words that anyone would use to describe this recovery.
In other words, Wal-Mart has been successfully milking a mature business for higher margins.
